facebook.caption:
POV: you wander off the main strip and find Mì Tê Lý Thường Kiệt.

4.6 stars. 161 reviews. Zero tourists in sight.

Artisan noodles made the old way. The kind of bowl that makes you sit back and say nothing for a minute.

Street address: 58B Lý Thường Kiệt, Phú Quốc. Write it down.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Watching the noodles go into the bowl at Mì Tê Lý Thường Kiệt. 4.6 stars and a line of locals. This is the one.

instagram.caption:
POV: you ditched the resort restaurant and found Mì Tê Lý Thường Kiệt.

4.6★, 161 reviews, all locals. Save this.
instagram.video_caption: Locals queuing. Noodles landing. Mì Tê Lý Thường Kiệt doing what it does. Don't walk past this one.

tiktok.caption: Found this by accident. Mì Tê Lý Thường Kiệt, 4.6★, 161 reviews. All locals. Do not skip. #PhuQuoc #PhuQuocFood #VietnamEats
